PubMed ID: 41227187. 2025/11/03 00:00. BACKGROUND: Patients with mixed dyslipidemia often require combination therapy 
to manage multiple lipid abnormalities.
OBJECTIVE: To evaluate fenofibric acid in combination with a statin across three 
studies of patients with mixed dyslipidemia.
METHODS: As prospectively planned, data were pooled from three randomized, 
double-blind, phase 3 studies of patients with low-density lipoprotein 
cholesterol (LDL-C) ≥130mg/dL, triglycerides (TG) ≥150mg/dL, and h
